title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LOOC NORTE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ASTURIAS, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4050 / 57 OG No. 12, 2109 (March 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2876, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LOOC NORTE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ASTURIAS, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Looc Norte in the Municipality of Asturias, Province of Cebu, is converted into a barrio of the said municipality, to be known as barrio of Looc Norte.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
